title: Carrier Jump Destinations
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM CarrierJump WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT StarSystem AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CarrierJump WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY StarSystem ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} carrier jump(s) completed during the report period. Your carrier's itinerary is a travel diary writ large — the destination breakdown tells the story of expeditions, mining operations, and the grand tours your floating city has made across the galaxy.
details.help: CarrierJump fires when a fleet carrier completes a jump. StarSystem is the destination. total drives the title as the jump count headline.

tagLines: Fleet carrier jump telemetry archived. Destination system catalogue updated in the carrier operations log.
Moving a carrier is a commitment. Each destination was a decision. The log shows the itinerary.
Every jump costs tritium. Every destination had a reason. Sometimes the reason was just 'somewhere new'.
